prompt: Here's my skedplus file for an overnight trip. Don't create events — just output the full event details (title, start, end, notes) for each event you would create, formatted exactly as they would appear in the calendar.

assertions.text: Produces exactly one event (short overnight correctly detected)
Event title matches format: 'E3180A · 2055 MSP → 0746 MSP'
Notes header says 'Overnight (2 days)' not 'Day 1 of 2'
Both legs appear in notes: DL4003 MSP → GRB and DL4140 GRB → MSP
RON hotel (Lodge Kohler, Green Bay WI) included in notes
Start time reflects report (2055 Jun 7), end time reflects release (0746 Jun 8)
